subject: npmx Weekly #17
headline: npmx Weekly #17
intro: Stay updated with the most impactful changes in our ecosystem! This week, we focus on new enhancements that improve security, reliability, and dependency management.

topics.title: Node Modules Inspector Update
topics.summary: The recent update to node-modules-inspector@2.1.0 introduces the 'Maintainer Actions' report page, offering actionable insights for package maintainers to enhance ecosystem quality.

topics.title: Trusted Publishing Standards
topics.summary: A new gold standard for trusted publishing mandates two-factor authentication (2FA) for maintainers, bolstering security and ensuring that only verified individuals can release updates.

topics.title: GitHub Actions Best Practices
topics.summary: Publishers are urged to implement immutable releases in GitHub actions to guarantee workflow stability and reliability, crucial for maintaining consistent production environments.
